race.comment: FORTYTHREEBEANS (3) talented filly who can put these away fourth-up on her home track. Went under narrowly on the heavy (9) track with a courageous second over 1300m at Wagga. Nose roll goes on and should prove too good for these. HARLEM TICKLE (10) hot and cold mare yet to break through in eight starts. Has further improvement at her third run back and stays in the mix on her home track. FRED ASTERN (5) improving with racing and comes here off a let-up. Given the gun run and was fair to the line when fourth over 1200m at Queanbeyan. Deserves another chance. REINCZECH (4) steps out here on debut. Well held in only trial. Place hope.
